daily_summary.headline: Quiet Day in Space: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 6-108
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 is set to launch a batch of 29 Starlink satellites, continuing the expansion of their global internet constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for a glimpse of the launch.

top_events.title: HASTE | That's Not A Knife (DART AE)
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's HASTE mission for the US Department of Defense is a hypersonic test flight, contributing to future hypersonic programs.
top_events.action: Check updates for possible launch window changes.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Firefly Aerospace's test flight aims to validate key systems for future upgrades, marking an important step in their development program.
top_events.action: Follow the mission for insights into Firefly's technology advancements.
